message:
test(oracle): add 12 conformance tests + fix CURRENT_DATE/TIME/TIMESTAMP literal codegen

Oracle tests: EXCEPT/INTERSECT, correlated subquery HAVING, REPLACE+triggers,
multi-column ORDER BY with NULLs, nested CASE+aggregates, UPDATE correlated SET,
compound LIMIT/OFFSET, negative zero and special floats, multi-CTE references,
UPSERT/RETURNING, boolean expressions, derived tables with aliases.

Also fixes CURRENT_DATE/CURRENT_TIME/CURRENT_TIMESTAMP to emit actual UTC text
values instead of NULL (emit_literal was routing datetime literals to Null opcode).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
